name: POLE guard (POLE hotspot → msi_h=False)
what_it_solves: Non-negotiable engine rule: 'POLE guard (POLE hotspot → msi_h=False)'
how_it_solves: If a canonical POLE hotspot mutation is detected in PatientState, RSFeatureSet.MSI_H is forced to False regardless of upstream flags.
why_it_exists: POLE-mutant hypermutation has been misclassified as MSI-H in upstream tools; this guard prevents WRN axis being triggered on a POLE-only case.
